summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The Rayliant NxtGen Multifactor US Equity ETF (RWLC) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the FT Wilshire US Large NxtGen index. The fund combines active management with quantitative analysis to provide a diversified portfolio of US large-cap stocks. The ETF utilizes machine learning models to analyze inputs and estimate expected risk-adjusted returns. RWLC was launched on Dec 15, 2021 and is issued by Rayliant.
infoTable: FT Wilshire US Large NxtGen Index
